raw.message: Give BetMGM Casino a shot! Sign up during March Matchups and enjoy your New Player Offer.🏀 🎰

hook.summary: Logo intro followed by 3D animation of casino chips and cards falling onto a green felt table.
hook.visual_action: A gold BetMGM logo appears on black, then transitions to poker chips and playing cards falling and bouncing on a green casino table.

scene_flow: BetMGM logo animation on a black background.
3D rendered poker chips and playing cards fall onto a green felt table.
A white promotional card slides in, detailing the March Matchups offer.
